name: Blades
description: Dual multimode filter with variable routing, self-oscillation, cutoff coupling, and a drive stage that morphs from soft clipping to wavefolding. Each side can behave as a clean filter, a distortion box, or a sine VCO.

controls.name: Cutoff
controls.description: Sets the cutoff frequency of both filters.

controls.name: Drive
controls.description: Sets gain, saturation, and wavefolding depth before each filter.

controls.name: Drive Shape
controls.description: Morphs the drive circuit between soft clipping and two-stage wavefolding.

controls.name: Response
controls.description: Continuously morphs between low-pass, band-pass, and high-pass.

controls.name: Routing
controls.description: Sets the signal flow between the two filters.

controls.name: CV Attenuverters
controls.description: Set depth and polarity for the filter CV inputs and routing CV.

controls.name: Cutoff Coupling
controls.description: Locks filter 2 cutoff relative to filter 1.

inputs.name: Routing CV
inputs.description: CV over the signal routing between the two filters.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: Unattenuated frequency CV, calibrated for 1V/oct tracking.

inputs.name: Drive CV
inputs.description: CV over drive amount. Unpatched, the input normalizes to a 2V offset.

outputs.name: Main Output
outputs.description: Blend of both filters determined by routing.

behaviors.name: Single, parallel, series
behaviors.description: The routing control morphs from one filter alone to both in parallel, then into a series cascade. The main output follows the crossfade while the second filter can still be used as a separate tap.

behaviors.name: Cutoff coupling
behaviors.description: With coupling on, filter 2 follows filter 1 by the offset set by its cutoff knob. It is the fast way to keep two filters moving together while preserving a spread.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillating sine pair
behaviors.description: Both filters self-oscillate cleanly and track 1V/oct. In oscillator mode the response control changes the phase of the sine-like output, which makes the module useful as a dual VCO.

behaviors.name: Drive into wavefolding
behaviors.description: The input stage moves from soft clipping into two-stage wavefolding. Hot signals become saturated before the filter, so the module can add aggression before any cutoff motion.

behaviors.name: Filter-mode morph
behaviors.description: The response control morphs continuously across low-pass, band-pass, and high-pass. On self-oscillation it behaves more like phase control than simple timbre shaping.

behaviors.name: Input mix and clipping
behaviors.description: The input is DC-coupled and the core can clip musically. Drive and resonance together create a filter that can behave like a dirty waveshaper before the actual filtering takes place.

behaviors.name: Two independent taps
behaviors.trigger: use Filter 1 and Filter 2 outputs separately
behaviors.description: Each filter can be taken from its own output, even when the main output is used as a mix bus. That makes split-band and stereo-like patches easy to build from one module.

patchIdeas.name: Series bass growl
patchIdeas.patch: Routing in series · Drive around 11 o'clock · Resonance medium-high · a saw VCO into IN and the main output into a VCA makes a thick bass line that gains bite before the filter pair closes down.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Blades:
* Routing: series
* Drive: 11 o'clock
* Response: low-pass
* Resonance: medium-high

VCO:
Envelope:
VCA:
Output:

- VCO (Saw) -> Blades (IN)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Envelope (Out) >> Blades (Drive CV)
- Blades (Main Output) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel stereo split
patchIdeas.patch: Routing set to parallel · Cutoff Coupling off · filter 1 and 2 sweep against each other with different cutoff CVs · the two outputs act like a stereo pair or a split-band processor with shared drive.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Blades:
* Routing: parallel
* Cutoff Coupling: off
* Drive: low
* Response: low-pass

VCO:
Envelope:
LFO:
Mixer:
Output:

- VCO (Saw) -> Blades (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Blades (Cutoff CV)
- Envelope (Out) >> Blades (Resonance CV)
- Blades (Filter 1 Output) -> Mixer (L)
- Blades (Filter 2 Output) -> Mixer (R)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Dual self-oscillator
patchIdeas.patch: Resonance pushed into self-oscillation · both filters tuned to a fifth apart using cutoff coupling · V/OCT tracks the pair as a two-voice sine source that can be mixed or processed separately.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Blades:
* Routing: single
* Cutoff Coupling: on
* Resonance: max
* Response: band-pass

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Blades (V/OCT)
- Blades (Filter 1 Output) -> Output (L)
- Blades (Filter 2 Output) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Wavefolded percussion
patchIdeas.patch: Short envelope into Drive CV · response around band-pass · high resonance and a clicky gate make each hit a pitched metallic thunk instead of a plain filtered drum.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Blades:
* Routing: single
* Drive Shape: fold
* Resonance: high
* Response: band-pass

Clock:
Drum Source:
Output:

- Drum Source (Out) -> Blades (IN)
- Clock (Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Blades (Drive CV)
- Blades (Main Output) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Cutoff-coupled drone
patchIdeas.patch: Cutoff Coupling on · filter 2 offset slightly above filter 1 · slow LFO into Cutoff CV and another into Routing CV · the two filters move together while staying offset, producing a wide animated drone.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Blades:
* Routing: series
* Cutoff Coupling: on
* Drive: low
* Resonance: medium

LFO:
VCO:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Blades (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Blades (Cutoff CV)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Blades (Routing CV)
- Blades (Main Output) -> Output (In)
